name: @ggui-samples/ggui-canvas-demo
description: Reference sample: ggui serve with `defaultMcpAppsMode: 'canvas'`. The MCP host mints one session-scoped iframe (`ui://ggui/session/<sessionId>`) instead of per-push iframes; subsequent pushes route through the session WebSocket channel. Used by the e2e suite to exercise the canvas-mode wire contract.
